content:
type: STATUS
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
summary: Added relevance_scores param to NDCG.compute (graded relevance); dcg/idcg now use get_relevance()/ideal_relevances but still reference the same 'ideal_length' variable at line 394, so your min(...)->len(expected_ids) edit should apply cleanly without conflict
